priorities.check_method: iceConfig.ts NOSTR_RELAYS rotated: DROPPED damus.io (rate-limited) + nostr.wine (paid) + relay.nostr.band (unreachable). KEPT nos.lol + relay.mostr.pub + purplerelay.com. Rotation date + rationale in comment header. npm run probe-relays confirms all 7 nostr relays HEALTHY (HTTP 200, <3s).

priorities.label: S44 P6 — Multi-strategy transport (race Nostr+Torrent+MQTT)
priorities.check_method: transport.ts rewritten end-to-end for 0.25 API (makeAction returns MessageAction<T> object not 3-tuple; onPeerJoin/onPeerLeave as property assignments; MessageContext.peerId). Multi-broadcast architecture (PRIME-AUDIT Δ2 over Council C4): all enabled strategies active simultaneously, send() broadcasts JSON on every strategy's action.send(), receive() forwards from any strategy's onMessage, peerJoin deduped by peerId across strategies, peerLeave only fires when ALL strategies lost the peer. Per-strategy ICE poll + relay-socket inspection. allStrategiesFailed() gates UI escalation. Dynamic-import torrent + mqtt behind STRATEGY_FLAGS (Vite inlined torrent since flag statically true; tree-shook mqtt since statically false). Public API preserved (NetTransport.connect/send/on/onPeerChange/peerCount/isConnected/getDiagnostics/disconnect + onError property).

priorities.label: S44 P7 — Per-relay telemetry + lobby diagnostics surfacing
priorities.check_method: NetDiagnostics extended with strategies: StrategyDiagnostic[] (name, state, peerCount, relays: RelayDiagnostic[], lastError). RelayDiagnostic = {url, connected}. getDiagnostics() introspects each handle.getSockets() for live socket attachment count. main.ts:894 diagnostic-strip formatter extended to surface [nostr:N/total torrent:N/total] per Council GE-NEW-2; disabled strategies omitted; failed strategies shown as 'name:fail'.
